name: Precision Golf Training
about: Precision Golf Training is an indoor golf performance studio located in Libertyville, Illinois, offering state-of-the-art training equipment and golf simulators to help golfers improve their game. The facility provides access to golf lessons, fitness programs, and on-site simulators available 24/7 for members. Utilizing a Foresight GCQuad and GC Hawk launch monitor connected to a 4k projector, the studio offers detailed swing analytics and a controlled environment for practice. Membership plans include various packages with differing weekly simulator hours, putting green access, and fitness area privileges.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art GCQuad and GC Hawk launch monitors with detailed analytics
Comprehensive membership plans with flexible simulator and fitness options
Indoor facility accessible year-round regardless of weather
Expert coaching and TPI fitness integration

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service available on-site
No mention of alcohol service; BYOB policy not specified

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium photometric camera launch monitor connected to 4k projector
Premium photometric camera launch monitor connected to 4k projector

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you'll need to bring your own golf clubs to use the simulators and practice areas.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify a policy on outside food and drinks, but there's no mention of on-site food service.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Time for 18 holes isn't specified, but simulator time is offered in hourly increments ranging from 1 hour per week to 1 hour per day depending on membership level.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: There's no specific information about child-friendly features or age requirements beyond the general membership policy requiring users to be 18+ or have adult supervision.
